zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese de Clare於大約1124年出生在英國英格蘭肯特托布利其時，她的父親Richard FitzGilbert de Clare35歲，母親Adeliza Meschines de Chester26歲。她於大約1148年與Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1175年在英國英格蘭享年52歲，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: Clare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The normal English vernacular form of   Clara   during the Middle Ages and since.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese de Clare was born about 1124, in Tonbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard FitzGilbert de Clare, was 35 and her mother, Adeliza Meschines de Chester, was 26. She married Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln about 1148, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1175, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese de Clare est née environ 1124, à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard FitzGilbert de Clare, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Meschines de Chester, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln environ 1148, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.South Elkington, Lincolnshire, England,: South Elkington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese de Clare um 1124 in Tonbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard FitzGilbert de Clare 35 und ihre Mutter Adeliza Meschines de Chester 26. Sie hat um 1148 in England Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1175 im Alter von 52 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Clareが約1124年にイギリスイギリスケントトンブリッジで生まれた時，父Richard FitzGilbert de Clareは35歳，母Adeliza Meschines de Chesterは26歳であった。約1148年にイギリスでGilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincolnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1175年にイギリスイギリスで52歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Clare(이)가 대략 1124년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 토브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard FitzGilbert de Clare(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza Meschines de Chester(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1148년 영국에서 Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 영국 잉글랜드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln aproximadamente 1148, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese de Clare родилась около 1124 г. в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard FitzGilbert de Clare было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Meschines de Chester, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln около 1148 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

Se casó con Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln aproximadamente 1148, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1175, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
